name: hanzi-reader-local-source-tts-api
description: Hanzi Reader modular com prática adaptativa, áudio centralizado e leitura contínua.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check js/script.mjs && node --check js/source-adapter.mjs && node --check js/voice-bridge.mjs && node --check js/manualSearch.mjs && node --check js/manualSearchCore.mjs && node --check js/visual-refresh.js && node --check js/learning-core.mjs && node --check js/learning-engine.mjs && node --check api/tts-edge.js
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-project.mjs && node scripts/validate-db.mjs && node scripts/validate-trad-simp-db.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run validate && npm run test:learning && npm run test:ui && npm run test:api
